data.title: Saks Global files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, receives permission to proceed with financing plan
data.description: The retailer has taken measures in an attempt to emerge from bankruptcy. In addition to what it has called "a transformative financial transaction," it has announced a leadership transition as part of its recovery process.

data.title: Coca-Cola to add a chief digital officer
data.description: The company said it is creating a chief digital officer position to consolidate responsibility for digital strategy, data and operational excellence across the enterprise.

data.title: Border States names a digital VP to expand B2B ecommerce
data.description: Charlie Hoertz will lead the company’s enterprise digital strategy, with a mandate to modernize systems and processes that support online ordering, customer experience, and operational efficiency.

data.title: Alibaba expands Qwen chatbot with agentic AI
data.description: Alibaba has made artificial intelligence (AI) a central pillar of its long-term strategy.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why retail chains are crafting new omnichannel experiences
data.description: Walmart, Home Depot and Lowe's are among leading retailers finding new ways to bring digital and physical experiences together with omnichannel outcomes.
